name: Loan Interest Rate Calculator
description: Compare interest costs across different loan rates.
formula: Rate found via iterative approximation solving the EMI formula

example.explanation: Given a loan of ₹5,00,000 with EMI of ₹10,624 for 5 years, the implied rate is 12.5% p.a.

faqs.question: Why estimate interest rate?
faqs.answer: It helps compare loan offers when you know the EMI and tenure but not the rate.

faqs.question: Is this exact?
faqs.answer: This uses a numeric approximation and may vary slightly depending on rounding.

faqs.question: How can I use this?
faqs.answer: Use this to reverse-calculate the interest rate from a quoted EMI to compare loan offers.
